patch.value: Config-driven optional close reason via governance.require_close_reason

pm close hard-requires a non-empty reason; for solo repos / agent automation the history record can suffice. A settings key (default true = no change) relaxes it, mirroring the validate-close config pattern.

governance.require_close_reason boolean (default true); when false, empty-reason close proceeds; CLI+MCP contracts mark reason conditionally required; validator+docs updated; default fully backward compatible.

pm close hard-requires a non-empty reason; for solo repos / agent automation the history record can suffice. A settings key (default true = no change) relaxes it, mirroring the validate-close config pattern.

value.note: Make bulk close reason optional when governance allows
Make close reason requirement conditional on governance setting
Align close command docs and positional reason handling
Allow close-task reason argument to be optional
Update config help text for governance-require-close-reason
Set default require_close_reason=true across governance presets
Persist and resolve require_close_reason through settings pipeline
Make pm_close reason optional in MCP schema and routing
Reflect optional close text and updated action schemas

value.text: Evidence: added governance.require_close_reason default-on setting through types/constants/settings/config/positional routing, close-close-many-close-task runtime behavior, MCP close schema, and contract/help updates. Verified via node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts tests/unit/config-command.spec.ts tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts tests/unit/settings-validator.spec.ts tests/unit/config-positional-value.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts and manual sandbox close without reason after disabling policy.

patch.value: Implemented governance.require_close_reason end-to-end and verified close behavior via unit/integration/manual tests.

value.text: Post-close follow-up on PR #120: added governance_require_close_reason to enabled/disabled synonym normalization and accepted pm_close text alias in MCP runAction close reason resolution. Re-verified targeted tests and full 100% coverage. Commit dc016aa4.
